_doc: Launch original sectional — Blood Relations. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: A is the father of B. B is the sister of C. How is A related to C?
questions.stem_hi: A, B का father है। B, C की sister है। A, C से कैसे related है?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Changed the stated gender or parent role while tracing the relation.
options.trap_reason_hi: Relation trace करते समय stated gender/parent role बदल दिया।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Stopped at the sibling link and ignored the parent-child step.
options.trap_reason_hi: Sibling link पर रुक गए और parent-child step ignore किया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Reversed the direction of relation from child-to-parent to parent-to-child.
options.trap_reason_hi: Relation की direction उलटी कर दी: child-to-parent की जगह parent-to-child।

questions.explanation_method_en: C is sibling of B, so A is parent of both; A is stated as father. Trace one link at a time and answer from the asked person's viewpoint. Therefore, answer = Father.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Blood relation questions are solved by drawing a small family chain. Keep gender and direction fixed; most wrong answers reverse the viewpoint. Final answer is Father.
questions.explanation_method_hi: C is sibling of B, so A is parent of both; A is stated as father. एक-एक link trace करें और asked person के viewpoint से relation दें। अतः answer = Father।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Blood relation questions में छोटा family chain बनता है। Gender और direction fix रखें; ज़्यादातर errors viewpoint reverse करने से होते हैं। Final answer Father है।

options.label: D

questions.explanation_concept_en: Blood relation questions are solved by drawing a small family chain. Keep gender and direction fixed; most wrong answers reverse the viewpoint. Final answer is Mother.
